name: Heng Yue Sect Decline
description: Wang Lin's departure and rise causes the decline of his former sect. Indirect karmic consequence.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Heng Yue Sect Decline. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
